title: Chapter 69
content:
Chapter 69

"Glug!"

"Glog!"

"Gulp!!!"

I fucked Zara's throat, which was quite loose on its own without me applying mana to her throat. I had to take it slow because of that, but once her gag reflex got better, it was easy to continue.

Not to mention...

"Ahh~~"

Very much good. The pleasure I derived from fucking her throat like that was amazing on its own, but the way she used her tongue somewhere in the middle, wrapping it around almost half of my girth, was an accomplishment on its own.

Although her tongue remained in position, the slimy, alive feeling to it provided me with variations of sensations every time I penetrated her tight throat. My sensitive head was being stimulated by her tight and soft throat, while the underside of my dick was being stimulated by her soft and wet tongue.

"Ugh!"

Zara was as formidable as Martha. While Martha was amazing in the sense of gentleness, Zara was...

"Kugh!"

Merciless. That was all I could think. In the first place, it was a wonder I could even think, let alone describe how I was feeling at the moment.

"I-I'm about to finish, Lady Zara!" I managed to warn her, but unknown to what it really meant, Zara kept draining me until I broke through the dams of pleasure and erupted inside her throat.

"Hmph!!!"

"Ahh~~"

Her eyes widened as the warm liquid entered her throat, filling her stomach, and the amount, I dare say, was enough to fill a one-liter bottle. Of course, it wasn't literally that, but I was letting out abnormally large fluids.

Since we had established it wasn't urine, Zara didn't push me away, nor did she have the strength to, but instead, she pulled me even deeper, making me grunt in torment as I came and came. Finally, all that was left was to exit her tight throat and relieve myself, but Zara had other plans.

While my dick was still inside her throat, she tightened her throat around my sensitive head.

"Argh!"

"Zomph!!"

Another grunt left my mouth, and it was nothing but pure torture. She was making weird noises as her mouth sucked on my dick, like she was sucking in air; she was relentless. Since I was still hard thanks to the state of completion, Zara didn't care about my condition and kept sucking me strongly to the point I was about to cum again.

Unfortunately...

[State of completion has ended]

'FUCKK!!'

If only I could murder someone right now.

"Haan~ Hmmn~~ It loo-looks like you're all do-donenngg~~~" Zara laboriously said as my depressing stub came out of her mouth on its own since its size wasn't even enough for her lips to fully cover it.

"Haa..." So many lives, and one would think I would have cultivated a good amount of patience. I never knew I could get angry over this as well.

I sighed and stepped back, looking at the pair of mother and daughter. The mother was a certified sex fiend on par with Martha, and the daughter, despite being a knight, lacked the necessary stamina to keep up with me. Well, it was her first time, so I'll give her some time to get used to it.

If only I could cover both of them in my liquid to finish the scene, but that wasn't happening.

Oh, now that I remember...

I approached Cassandra, who was still trembling slightly, but only a quiver once in a while. The place the quiver originated was from none other than her abdomen, not her pussy, as one might think.

I had already pressed no on the pregnancy notifications, so the mana was still inside her since she had passed out without being able to absorb it. I placed my hand on her back, the backside of her abdomen, and circulated my mana to assimilate the mana from me into her aura core.

It didn't take much time, and I finished the solidification of her third star aura core, which was a surprise. It would mean she was a D rank, just two ranks below her father and on par with her mother, if we were purely calculating in terms of ranks.

With this solidification, she had managed to reach the peak of the third star, making her quite strong in just one session, which would mean she was quite close.

That reminded me, "What rank are you, Lady Zara?"

I asked without thinking, but now that I realized, asking a noble like that could be offensive. To my surprise, however, Zara simply replied, "I-I finished the construction of my fourth circle yes-yesterday."

The vibration coming from her ass was still ongoing, so she must still be feeling it.

Anyway, that was a surprise. Either Zara and Cassandra were already at peak and one or two sessions from me were enough, or there was something else causing them to break through so quickly.

But that wasn't possible. The women of my family were cultivating with the highest grade techniques, so it didn't make sense that the absorption rate was lower than it was for these two.

That left me with two questions.

And the one with the most probability was...

"Is there a special reason as to why you're increasing in strength so quickly?" I couldn't help but ask.

"Haha~" Zara chuckled a little before she replied, "I gu-guess a common breed like you wouldn't know, huh?"

Her tone wasn't contemptuous at all. It was more like she was just letting me know.

"Common breed?" I asked.

"Ye-yes." Zara replied before she said, "Unfortunately, I cannot have this conversation right now, so... so let us have it some other time."

Although the pleasure she was feeling wasn't mind-numbing but it was still constant, so it was better to let her be for a while. Besides, as long as it was information, I could get it from somewhere else.

At the moment, the fact that the power growth of Zara and Cassandra was higher was due to something related to a breed. I needed to find out what it was, but there was a good chance the people of my rank, common rank, didn't know much about it, considering how Zara was saying it.

Anyway, there was about half an hour until noon, and the mother and daughter pair were out of it. I settled them next to each other for my twisted satisfaction once again and made my way out of the room.

"Is the lady alright now?" As soon as I came out, the soldier at the door asked. His companion, who went to fetch Cassandra, wasn't here, but I didn't really care.

"Yes." I simply replied and said, "I will visit my house briefly to let them know of some news."

"If you're talking about moving into the next house, then you don't have to worry. The Young Lady has already ordered some of the guards to take care of it. They should be arriving soon." The guard said.

Cocking an eyebrow at him, I didn't ask anything and made my way out of the mansion to go to the house next to it. The houses in the noble district were either for the too wealthy, which was a rarity in this town, or reserved for the visits of the nobles, which was also a rarity.

And so, the house next to the lord's mansion, which was about half in size and extravagance, was being cleaned.

There was a carriage with stuff from my house inside, and I recognized most of it. I also saw another carriage, and I could see Martha's face peeking out of it. I approached her and since she was focused on the big house, according to her perspective, when I said...

"Hey!"

"Kyaahh!!!"

She was extremely startled. That also alerted those inside the carriage, and they immediately exited, especially Rayla and Julian. Rayla immediately hugged me, and I didn't waste the chance to grab her by her soft ass. Pity I could only do it from the outside because her skirts were just too long.

As for Julian, he began to pat my back with pride brimming in his voice, "Well done, son. I can't express how proud of you I am. It is only due to your blessing that we can live in the place that we only ever dreamt of."

I could tell he was happy. Well, that much was fine, given I was shagging his wife, so I didn't really mind sharing my wealth with him.

I mean, I was kind of obligated to, as well. Given that he was this vessel's father and all.

"It's all right, Father. My achievements are the achievements of this family." I simply said without complicating the matter.

Also, Rayla was even happier with my words, so she hugged me even more, saying, "Oh, my sweet, sweet boy. You truly are a blessing."

Yep, yep. Almost there.

I had almost raised her skirt bit by bit and was about to grab her naked ass when...

"We're done cleaning, Master Jack." And Rayla broke our hug, led by an enthusiastic Martha.

Fuck once again.

~~

Let me know if there are any mistakes.
